aknrenderer-extensionname: The name of the extension, shown on [[Special:Version]] and in the extension credits.
aknrenderer-desc:
{{desc|name=Akoma Ntoso Renderer|url=https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:AknRenderer}}
Short description of the extension, shown on [[Special:Version]].
content-model-akn-xml: Human-readable name of the 'akn-xml' content model. Shown on [[Special:Version]], page information ({{int:pageinfo-content-model}}), and [[Special:ChangeContentModel]].
aknrenderer-render-invalidxml: Error box shown on a Law page whose stored content is not well-formed XML and therefore cannot be parsed for rendering.
aknrenderer-render-nobody: Warning box shown when an otherwise valid Akoma Ntoso document contains no body element to render.
aknrenderer-provenance: Per-provision provenance footnote on Law/Decree pages. $1 is a link to the amending gazette page; $2 is the effective date (YYYY-MM-DD).
lawsamendedby-summary: Summary shown under the heading on [[Special:LawsAmendedBy]].
lawsamendedby-prompt: Shown when Special:LawsAmendedBy is opened without a valid gazette subpage.
lawsamendedby-intro: Heading above the amendments list. $1 is the gazette page title (rendered as a link).
lawsamendedby-empty: Shown when the given gazette has no applied amendments.
lawsamendedby-untargeted: Group heading for applied amendments whose target page is unmatched.
lawsamendedby-col-provision: Table column header: the amended provision's eId.
lawsamendedby-col-action: Table column header: the amendment action.
lawsamendedby-col-effective: Table column header: the effective date.
inforcestatus-summary: Summary shown under the heading on [[Special:InForceStatus]].
inforcestatus-empty: Shown when no consolidated revisions are recorded.
inforcestatus-col-page: Table column header: the law/decree page.
inforcestatus-col-inforce: Table column header: the in-force effective date.
inforcestatus-col-fek: Table column header: the gazette citation.
inforcestatus-col-amendments: Table column header: number of applied amendments.
aknrenderer-render-invalidschema: Heading of the warning box shown on a Law/Gazette page whose stored content does not validate against the Akoma Ntoso schema (schema/akomantoso30.xsd). Followed by a bulleted list of the schema errors.
aknrenderer-save-invalidschema: Error shown when an edit is rejected because the content does not validate against the Akoma Ntoso schema. $1 is a bulleted list of the schema validation errors.
aknrenderer-schema-more: Trailing list item shown when the number of schema errors exceeds the display limit. $1 is the count of additional, undisplayed errors. {{PLURAL}} is used.
pageinfo-aknrenderer: Section title on the action=info page for the group of metadata extracted from the Akoma Ntoso document. Used as {{int:pageinfo-aknrenderer}}.
aknrenderer-revisions-tab: Label of the tab that replaces "View history" on Law pages, linking to action=revisions.
aknrenderer-revisions-title: Page heading for action=revisions. $1 is the law's page title.
aknrenderer-revisions-intro: Introductory line above the version table on action=revisions.
aknrenderer-revisions-empty: Shown on action=revisions when no versions are indexed for the page yet.
aknrenderer-revisions-notakn: Shown on action=revisions when the page is not an Akoma Ntoso document.
aknrenderer-revisions-col-effective: Column header: date the version came into force.
aknrenderer-revisions-col-fek: Column header: the government gazette (ΦΕΚ) that caused the version.
aknrenderer-revisions-col-status: Column header: legal-force status of the version.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-active: Status value: this version is currently in force.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-expired: Status value: this version has been superseded by a later one.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-future: Status value: this version's effective date is in the future.
aknrenderer-revisions-status-unknown: Status value: this version's XML declares no FRBRExpression or FRBRWork date, so its place in the timeline can't be determined.
aknrenderer-revisions-version: Fallback link label when a version has no effective date. $1 is the revision id.
aknrenderer-amendments-received: Heading above the table of amendments this document's <passiveModifications> record it received from other acts.
aknrenderer-amendments-made: Heading above the table of amendments this document's <activeModifications> record it made to other acts.
aknrenderer-amendments-col-provision: Column header: the eId within this document affected by the amendment (linked).
aknrenderer-amendments-col-source: Column header, 'amendments received' table: the IRI of the amending provision in the other act.
aknrenderer-amendments-col-target: Column header, 'amendments made' table: the IRI of the amended provision in the other act.
aknrenderer-amendments-col-type: Column header: the kind of textual modification (repeal, substitution, etc.).
aknrenderer-amendments-col-date: Column header: the date the modification took force, when recorded.
aknrenderer-info-title: action=info field label: the document's FRBRalias (its human title).
aknrenderer-info-doctype: action=info field label: the document type (law, decree, etc.), humanized via AknVocabulary::DOC_TYPES.
aknrenderer-info-number: action=info field label: the document's FRBRnumber (e.g. the law's own sequential number).
aknrenderer-info-enacted: action=info field label: the document's FRBRWork enactment date.
aknrenderer-info-fek: action=info field label: the gazette's generic name (e.g. "Εφημερίδα της Κυβερνήσεως"), from <publication showAs>.
aknrenderer-info-fek-series: action=info field label: the gazette series/τεύχος (Α, Β, Γ, ...), from <publication name>.
aknrenderer-info-fek-number: action=info field label: the gazette issue number, from <publication number>.
aknrenderer-info-pub-date: action=info field label: the gazette publication date, from <publication date>.
aknrenderer-info-country: action=info field label: the document's FRBRcountry, humanized via AknVocabulary::COUNTRIES.
aknrenderer-info-language: action=info field label: the document's FRBRlanguage, humanized via AknVocabulary::LANGUAGES.
aknrenderer-info-subtype: action=info field label: the document's FRBRsubtype, humanized via AknVocabulary::DOC_TYPES.
aknrenderer-info-author: action=info field label: the issuing authority resolved from FRBRauthor via the <references> block.
aknrenderer-info-work-uri: action=info field label: the FRBR Work-level URI.
aknrenderer-info-expr-uri: action=info field label: the FRBR Expression-level URI.
aknrenderer-info-manif-uri: action=info field label: the FRBR Manifestation-level URI.
aknrenderer-info-keywords: action=info field label: the flattened list of <meta><classification><keyword> display labels.
aknrenderer-info-history: action=info field label: the flattened list of <lifecycle><eventRef> events.
aknrenderer-modtype-repeal: Label for a <textualMod type="repeal">: a provision is struck out entirely.
aknrenderer-modtype-substitution: Label for a <textualMod type="substitution">: a provision's text is replaced.
aknrenderer-modtype-insertion: Label for a <textualMod type="insertion">: new text is added.
aknrenderer-modtype-replacement: Label for a <textualMod type="replacement">: distinct from substitution in the AKN spec, but frequently rendered with the same word in Greek.
aknrenderer-modtype-renumbering: Label for a <textualMod type="renumbering">: a provision's number/label changes without its text changing.
aknrenderer-modtype-split: Label for a <textualMod type="split">: one provision becomes several.
aknrenderer-modtype-join: Label for a <textualMod type="join">: several provisions become one.
